error_signature: The input element to parse is empty
title: Empty input error for REPORT request in HTTP node
symptom: When sending a REPORT request via the HTTP node, n8n returns 'The input element to parse is empty'. This occurs despite the request working in other API testing tools.
applies_when: Using HTTP node to send a REPORT request
Including a body in the request
not_this_if: Using POST, PUT, PATCH, or GET methods
root_cause: n8n's HTTP Request node currently has a limitation where it does not send request bodies for WebDAV methods like REPORT. As a result, the body is dropped, leading to the server returning an error about empty input.
fix_steps: Replace the HTTP Request node with a Code node
Use native fetch or the https module to construct and send the REPORT request
Include the necessary headers and body in your code
agent_instruction: Use a Code node to send the REPORT request directly with the appropriate body and headers.
